description: A player realizes they have two separate accounts (one old, one new) and wants to merge them.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two accounts belonging to the player.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates both the old and new accounts.

nodes.task_description: Verify the player's ownership of both accounts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully verifies ownership via security questions for both accounts.

nodes.task_description: Transfer all items and progress from the old account to the new primary account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the script to migrate all assets.

nodes.task_description: Deactivate the old account after the merge is complete.
